<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check player position and red path changes
seg = current_frame.segmentation

blue_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 24]
print("Player:")
for bn in blue_nodes:
    print(f"  Node {bn['id']}: boundary={bn['boundary']}")

red_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'R']
print("\nRed:")
for rn in red_nodes:
    print(f"  {rn['pixels']}px, boundary={rn['boundary'][:8]}...")

# Check maze around player
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nRows 31-42, cols 12-45:")
for i in range(31, 43):
    print(f"Row {i}: {ascii_lines[i][12:46]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
